//: Composite indexes the Phase-2 session model needs. Firestore requires a composite index for any query that filters on two or more fields. The single-session reconciliation (startSession), bulk session-action by username, and stats-by-contest queries filter on (username_norm, contest_slug). Deploy with: gcloud firestore indexes composite create ... OR `firebase deploy --only firestore:indexes` if you use the Firebase CLI. The first real query against a missing index returns an error whose message contains a one-click console URL to create it.
